effects.label: Gradient Overlay
effects.description: Dark gradient from top to bottom, ideal for text readability over images

effects.label: Ken Burns
effects.description: Slow zoom in over 20 seconds, creates cinematic movement

effects.label: Slow Pan
effects.description: Slow horizontal pan across image, reveals more of the scene

effects.label: Zoom on Hover
effects.description: Image scales up slightly on mouse hover for interactive feel

effects.label: Parallax Scroll
effects.description: Background image moves slower than foreground content on scroll

effects.label: Glass Blur
effects.description: Frosted glass effect applied over the image for modern look

effects.label: Color on Hover
effects.description: Image starts grayscale, reveals full color on hover

effects.label: Vignette
effects.description: Dark edges that draw focus to the center of the image
